name: Royal Gold, Inc.
description: Royal Gold, Inc. is a leading precious metals streaming and royalty company based in Denver, Colorado. The company focuses on acquiring and managing precious metal streams, royalties, and similar interests in mining projects globally. Unlike traditional mining companies, Royal Gold does not operate mines; instead, it provides upfront capital to mining companies in exchange for the right to purchase a portion of the metal production at a fixed price or to receive a percentage of revenue. Its portfolio primarily features gold, silver, and copper assets across several continents.
